AppTerms.title: Terms and Conditions of Purchase
AppTerms.intro: We request all our visitors to carefully read the following terms and conditions of electronic sale, as these constitute the applicable legal framework for transactions made on this portal, safeguarding the defense of your rights as a consumer in accordance with the applicable laws in the United States of America.

info.title: MERCANTILE INFORMATION AND CONTACT DETAILS
info.p1: The owner of the domain of this Website is SAFESOLF INTERNACIONAL S.A.S. Inc., a corporation constituted under the laws of the State of Delaware, United States of America, with registered office at 2055 Limestone Rd STE 200-C, Wilmington, DE 19808. You can contact us preferentially through the email address marketing@encriptados.io, and we will respond to your email as quickly and as soon as possible.
info.p2: This document (hereinafter "Terms of Use") regulates the access and use of the website www.encriptados.io (hereinafter, the "Website") owned by SAFESOLF INTERNACIONAL S.A.S. Inc. (hereinafter "SAFESOLF"); by the users, as well as the access to the content that may be available on it, the provision of services and products marketed on said Web, and eventual responsibilities derived from the breach or defective fulfillment of the Conditions of Use.
info.p3: Access, navigation and use of the Web implies the express and unreserved acceptance of all terms of these Terms of Use, whose validity and efficacy is that of any contract concluded in writing and signed. Its observance and compliance will be enforceable with respect to any person who accesses, navigates or uses the Web in any form. Therefore, if you do not agree with these Terms of Use or for any reason do not comply with them (for example, by being under 18 years of age) you must immediately cease browsing and refrain from using the Web in any form.
info.p4: By accessing and using the services of the SAFESOLF website, the user represents and warrants that they have not been included in any list of trade embargoes or economic sanctions, the list of Specially Designated Nationals maintained by OFAC or the Denied Persons or Entities List of the US Department of Commerce. SAFESOLF reserves the right to choose markets and jurisdictions to conduct business, and may restrict or refuse, at its discretion, the provision of services and the sale of products in certain countries or regions.

products.title: PRODUCT INFORMATION
products.p1: On our website, you will find the description and characteristics of each product offered, with its technical specifications, uses, sizes, image, components, properties, quality, and relevant suitability, which constitute the due attention to the right to information and knowledge of the product that corresponds to the end user.
products.p2: The graphic images of the product are not to scale, and therefore do not adapt to the reality of the product, since presentations are offered that are not compatible with the screen resolution. In accordance with the foregoing, SAFESOLF certifies that the product information is conditioned to the description contained in its specifications, which is faithful to the reality thereof.

capacity.title: LEGAL CAPACITY
capacity.p1: The products and services are only available to persons who have legal capacity to contract. Accordingly, persons who do not have such capacity for the full exercise of their rights and attributes, such as minors, may not use the services. The acts they perform on this site will be the responsibility of their parents, guardians, managers, or curators, and will therefore be considered performed by them in the exercise of their legal representation. Anyone acting on behalf of a company must have the capacity to contract on behalf of such entity and bind it under the terms of this Agreement.
capacity.p2: The user assumes full responsibility to third parties for all orders and transactions issued on the website, as well as the resources to finance such transactions, as they presuppose their consent and authorization, being of exclusive knowledge of the user.

exportControl.title: EXPORT CONTROLS AND REGULATORY COMPLIANCE
exportControl.p1: The products and services offered by SAFESOLF (including, but not limited to, encrypted devices, encrypted SIMs/eSIMs, and secure communications software) are subject to export control laws and regulations. You acknowledge and agree that: (a) You will not export, re-export, transfer, or otherwise make available, directly or indirectly, any product or technology of SAFESOLF to any country, person, or entity subject to sanctions or export restrictions under United States laws without first obtaining all required licenses, authorizations, or permits. (b) You will not use the products for any prohibited purpose, including without limitation the development, production, or use of chemical, biological, nuclear weapons or missiles. (c) You are solely responsible for complying with all export, import, and customs laws applicable in your jurisdiction and in the destination jurisdiction. (d) SAFESOLF reserves the absolute right to refuse any order or cancel any transaction if it suspects or has reason to believe that it might violate any export control law. Any violation of this clause shall constitute immediate grounds for termination of your account and may result in a report to the competent authorities.

sales.title: FORMALIZATION OF THE PRODUCT SALE CONTRACT
sales.p1: For all cases in which the law requires a "Product Sale Contract" or equivalent document, it will be understood that these Terms and Conditions, together with the price, delivery method, payment method, and essential characteristics of the Product, constitute the Sale Contract between the User and SAFESOLF. For this purpose, once the transaction is approved by the corresponding banking entity or respective platform depending on the payment method, the User will be able to see a summary containing the conditions of the transaction carried out. In turn, these Terms and Conditions will always be available on the website.

liability.title: EXEMPTION FROM LIABILITY
liability.p1: The User and/or Client of SAFESOLF will be responsible for damages and losses that may be suffered directly or indirectly as a consequence of the breach of any of the conditions described in the Privacy Notice, the law, and in the Terms and Conditions of use of the Website described in this declaration.
liability.p2: SAFESOLF will make its best efforts to maintain updated information. However, it assumes no legal responsibility or of any other nature for the accuracy, timeliness, content, or uses given to said information, reminding the User and/or Client that to determine if the provided information applies to their particular case, it will be necessary to contact us through our official communication channels.
liability.p3: SAFESOLF, as owner of the Website, will make its best effort to maintain the correct functionality of the Website. However, the User and/or Client will assume the risks, damages, or losses, including but not limited to the loss of information or utility, existence of viruses, results of the use or inability to use the resources of the Website, among others.
liability.p4: The User shall hold SAFESOLF and its related companies harmless, as well as those who direct, succeed, manage, represent, and/or work in them, for any administrative or judicial claim initiated by other Users, third parties, or by any agency. Likewise, the indemnity is predicated on the sole responsibility of the user in the use of the products and services purchased on the website www.encriptados.io, for which SAFESOLF is not directly or indirectly responsible for the criminal classifications that arise from the user's query and that supervene with the use or disposition of the purchased products and services, since at the time of purchase, such conducts leave the sphere of responsibility of SAFESOLF, turning to the principle of personal criminal responsibility.

registration.title: REGISTRATION DURING THE USE OF THE SITE
registration.p1: For all purposes, entering the site is conditioned on providing certain identity data necessary to execute transactions; therefore, the authorized User will access the web for the sole purpose of purchasing products and/or services offered on this site. SAFESOLF is not responsible for the accuracy of the Personal Data provided by its Users. Users guarantee and respond, in any case, for the accuracy, truthfulness, validity, and authenticity of the entered Personal Data. If a fraudulent and/or malicious use and/or contrary to these Terms and Conditions and/or contrary to good faith is verified or suspected by SAFESOLF, it will have the unappealable right to decline the transaction object of payment of products and services, and likewise, if it discretionarily considers it, to legally pursue the offenders.
registration.p2: The User will be solely responsible for all operations carried out in and from their Account, as well as the use they give, whether directly or through an intermediary, to the products and services contracted through the WEB and acquired by this means.

prohibitedUses.title: PROHIBITED USES AND OBLIGATION OF LEGAL USE
prohibitedUses.p1: SAFESOLF expressly requires that all its products and services be used exclusively for lawful purposes. You represent, warrant, and agree that: (a) You will not use the products for illegal, fraudulent, defamatory, harassing, money laundering, terrorist financing activities, violation of intellectual property rights, or any other activity that violates applicable law in the United States or in your jurisdiction. (b) You will not use the products to evade the law, hide your identity in the commission of crimes, or interfere with legal investigations. (c) You understand that no encryption or privacy product offers absolute protection or immunity from the law. Any improper or illegal use of the products will be immediate cause for suspension or termination of access, cancellation of the account, and possible reporting to the competent authorities. SAFESOLF fully cooperates with law enforcement when required by law.
prohibitedUses.p2: By accessing or using the website or any service, you agree to be bound by and strictly comply with these terms of use. If you do not agree to be bound by these Terms of Use, do not access or use the Website or the Products and services it offers. You must review these Terms of Use regularly, as they may change at any time. If you object to the changes made, you must stop using the website and services. If you continue to use the website or any service after these Terms of Use have been amended, you are deemed to agree to comply with these Terms of Use as modified.
prohibitedUses.p3: By accepting these Terms of Use, you declare to be aware of all the foregoing, and expressly acknowledge that SAFESOLF cannot be held responsible for circumstances that may arise from the use of products purchased through the Web. SAFESOLF requires the end user to use its products and services for legal purposes only. In this sense, you expressly state and warrant that you understand this statement, and in the event that this statement is not consistent, you must refrain from or stop using the products and Services. SAFESOLF reserves the right to suspend or cancel your access or services with or sin notice if this statement is false or inaccurate, if it notices any fraud or improper use of the products, and you understand and accept that you will strictly comply with these terms of use and that you will take all measures required by applicable laws to guarantee strict compliance with these terms.

validityAndPrices.title: VALIDITY PERIODS OF THE PUBLISHED OFFER AND PRICE DETAILS
validityAndPrices.p1: The commercial offer of the products and services is indefinite and will be valid while stocks last. It will be understood as exhausted when its publication is removed from the website, and its acceptance will be tacit with the will to purchase and use the platform for such purposes.
validityAndPrices.p2: It should be noted that SAFESOLF will not be bound by manifest transcription errors in the statements in the website offer. There is the possibility that product variations may occur as a result of image resolution or other technical reasons, but it is not responsible for these variations. It is accepted by the consumer that the offer conditions are accepted upon proceeding to purchase the product and it is a sign of express acceptance of this terms and conditions document.
validityAndPrices.p3: Prices are expressed in USD, warning that SAFESOLF reserves the right to make changes to prices prior to an order being placed. SAFESOLF also reserves the right to limit or terminate offers and promotions at any time without any prior notice. The representative rate of the actual day of purchase will be used for exchange purposes.
validityAndPrices.p4: To deliver your order to the desired address, SAFESOLF charges shipping costs that may vary according to the quantities requested. These costs will be invoiced separately, where applicable, and will be specified and added to the total amount of the order. Delivery times for products will fluctuate according to the zone or country of delivery.

availability.title: AVAILABILITY OF PRODUCTS ON THE PORTAL
availability.p1: The availability of the products is conditioned on stock inventory; therefore, SAFESOLF will refrain from presenting to the electronic market products that are not current or available, warning also that, if required by the end user, it can generate a communication space at the email marketing@encriptados.io in order to agree directly with the seller on a term for obtaining the required products, which will be subject to the same conditions of sale, payment, and return.

paymentForms.title: METHODS OF PAYMENT
paymentForms.p1: When making purchases on the website https://www.encriptados.io, the end user freely and voluntarily AGREES to immediately receive and pay the invoices for the purchase of items offered through this medium, authorizing also that from this date the payment receipt with the exact description of the purchased products be sent by email, exonerating SAFESOLF from sending said documents in physical form. Therefore, the client accepts that it is their responsibility to have the email address reported active in order for the documents supporting the purchase to be sent to this communication channel.

paymentMethods.title: MEANS OF PAYMENT THAT CAN BE USED ON THE SITE
paymentMethods.intro: The products and services offered on the Site, unless a different method is indicated for particular cases or offers of certain goods or services, can only be paid for with the means specifically indicated in each case. For the purpose of the foregoing, the Website has the following timely and authorized means of payment:

creditCard.title: Credit card payment
creditCard.p1: The use of credit cards will be subject to what is established in these Terms and Conditions and, in relation to their issuer, to what is agreed in the respective Opening Contracts and Regulation of Use of a banking nature. In case of contradiction, what is expressed in that last instrument shall prevail. In the case of bank cards accepted on the Site, aspects relating to these, such as emission date, expiration, limit, blockages, etc., will be governed by the respective Opening Contract and Regulation of Use of the bank, so SAFESOLF will have no responsibility for any of the aspects indicated. The Site may indicate certain purchase conditions according to the payment method used by the user.

atm.title: ATM device payment
atm.p1: To operate payment through an ATM device, the user must carry an ATM card or a debit card and enter a personal identification number (PIN), following also some on-screen instructions necessary for the banking service to be carried out.
atm.p2: Therefore, said authentication constitutes proof of recognition and verification of customer security at various levels. By incorporating personal data into the device, it is clear that the transaction is subject to verification by the financial entity, and from there SAFESOLF's exemption from liability for the resources object of the transaction is immediate upon leaving its civil jurisdiction. As such, SAFESOLF is exempt from all liability from the moment the bank verification of the transaction is generated, so SAFESOLF cannot be blamed for tracking resources under the premise of good security and protection practices among all those who intervene in our products and services.

crypto.title: Payment through crypto assets and/or Tether (TRX) linked with platforms
crypto.p1: In the described payment modality, it is clear that our policies are rigorous regarding the identity of purchasers and users of our products and services, which is why our links to platforms under the payment gateway model, in this case with crypto assets and/or Tether (TRX), contain strong security verification using KYC tools usually recognized by said platforms for end user verification. The mandatory verification of a user's identity, normally by a financial or collection entity of resources under any modality, includes among others the verification of information that can be used to prove the identity of the purchaser in database networks, as well as documentary and address verification, among others.
crypto.p2: On payment platforms, the KYC process is mandatory for each of their clients; only then can they have access to all the platform's products and services, in addition to enabling the use of various currencies for the exchange of products and services on our Website, so said verification also guarantees the origin of the resources that the user disposes of for payment of the offered products and services, as well as their identity; therefore, the user, by entering our website, ADHERES TO THE RECOGNITION AND ACCEPTANCE THAT THEIR PERSONAL INFORMATION MAY BE DISCLOSED TO CREDIT AGENCIES AND AGENCIES FOR THE PREVENTION OF FRAUD OR THE PREVENTION OF FINANCIAL CRIMES, AS PART OF SAFESOLF'S EXEMPTION FROM LIABILITY AND CORRESPONDING INDEMNITY. Our policies to prevent money laundering, terrorist financing, and illegal activities are aimed at preventing attacks against company assets, its officers, and service provision, developing commercial relationships with reliable and secure business associates.
crypto.p3: The user then, by accessing the WEB and even more by acquiring our products and services, agrees to:
list: Comply with applicable legal and other regulations in force.

Guarantee appropriate control measures, which prevents any exchange and/or foreign trade operation that could be used as an instrument for concealing, managing, investing, or taking advantage of assets or resources from illegal activities.

Likewise, the user, by entering the Website, declares that the economic resources used for the purchase of products and services on the Website do not in any case come from illegal activities and have no commercial relationship with third parties engaged in illegal conduct.

bankTransfer.title: Payment through bank transfer
bankTransfer.p1: In the described payment modality, the consumer and/or end user transfers at their own account and risk to the accounts designated in the payment methods, and the charge to their value, from the bank entity, or transfer to the bank account, sending the deposit slip to SAFESOLF's contact sources. Transfers will be enabled in US dollars as the preferred currency, and in case of impossibility of such transaction, they will be made at the closing exchange rate of the day; understanding that additional costs due to exchange rate differences must be assumed by the Consumer and/or end user. This exact value of the currency exchange must be the one reported in the payment support sent to SAFESOLF; otherwise, the purchased service or product will not be released or delivered until the missing payment is completed.

purchaseContract.title: Formalization of the purchase contract
purchaseContract.p1: In your capacity as a consumer and/or end user, the contract will be understood to be perfected only if you as a client are over 18 years old and acquire through purchase and sale the products listed in the commercial offer available on the web portal. The orders you place through the Website for the products offered on https://www.encriptados.io are only an offer to conclude a purchase and sale contract. The aforementioned contract will only be effectively concluded when SAFESOLF confirms the order and shipping options to you by email. Before receiving such confirmation by this means, the order can be canceled. If SAFESOLF does not confirm your order within ten business days, it will be considered rejected.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.p1: SAFESOLF will deliver to the address provided in the data registration forms. Deliveries will be made on business days. If you request SAFESOLF to deliver the order in multiple shipments, the latter may charge you extra delivery costs. Each individual shipment will constitute a separate contract. If SAFESOLF is delayed in delivering a shipment or one of the shipments is incorrect, this will not entitle you to cancel any other shipment.
delivery.p2: Delivery periods are indicative and, therefore, are not considered strict deadlines. The mere fact of having exceeded a delivery period will not give you any right to compensation. For this, a notice of default must be sent to SAFESOLF, waiting for the reasonable time designated in the delivery periods according to the carrier chosen by the client. In the event that delivery is not made under these terms, the amount paid will be refunded to the consumer and no compensation will apply for said concept.

deliveryIssues.title: Alternatives in case of delivery problems
deliveryIssues.p1: If SAFESOLF, before concluding the contract, observes that it cannot supply the requested products, it may offer you an equivalent product in terms of quality, price, and function. You will not be obliged to accept the replacement product. If you wish, you may return it within 5 days and SAFESOLF will bear the necessary and reasonable costs for it to be returned from its destination.
deliveryIssues.p2: In case the contract is concluded and SAFESOLF observes that it cannot under any circumstances supply the ordered products and is not responsible for this situation, it will have the right to terminate the contract, immediately informing thereof and reimbursing the payments you have made.

returns.title: RETURNS
returns.p1: The client and/or End User may return the received products once they have contacted SAFESOLF at the designated email, explaining the reasons for the return and returning the product within 7 business days following receipt of the product. Likewise, the products must be sent unused and complete, including their original packaging. Once your return is authorized, we will contact you to coordinate its collection by our carrier. The return of products will be at SAFESOLF's expense and risk.
returns.p2: In the event of a valid return, the purchase price will be refunded within ten days following receipt of the product and cancellation of the contract. However, the client and/or end user must be aware that there are banking processes that can take up to 60 days, which is why constant communication between the client and the bank is required to monitor the return.
returns.p3: If a product is returned and SAFESOLF notices that it is altered due to an act or omission attributable to the client, it may reduce from the refund the return amount for the decrease in product value as a consequence of these damages. You can avoid the obligation to compensate for the decrease in value of a product caused by the use of said product if you do not use the product as if it were your own and if you refrain, as far as reasonably possible, from any action that could negatively affect its value.
returns.p4: If you wish to express a verbal complaint about the conclusion of the contract or its compliance, you can send your request to the email address: marketing@encriptados.io

retract.title: Right of withdrawal
retract.p1: The aforementioned withdrawals must be requested through the Website and in our original channel.
retract.p2: To exercise the right of withdrawal, the user must prove that the product is not damaged or deteriorated due to actions corresponding to their domain, must also have the original labels, accessories, and packaging (including manuals, user guides, warranty certificates), the product must not show signs of use, dirt, or wear and must not have been delivered more than FIVE (5) business days ago.

warrantyExemptions.title: WARRANTY EXCLUSIONS
warrantyExemptions.intro: THE PRODUCT WARRANTY DOES NOT APPLY WHEN:
list: The equipment shows abuse, damage caused by natural disasters, or use other than that indicated in the operating instructions.
It presents damage caused by voltage fluctuations of electrical energy or atmospheric electrical discharges.

The damage is caused by the adaptation and installation of non-genuine parts or accessories, not authorized by the seller, by lack of care with the product, or external factors (oxidation, discoloration, scratches, excess dust, blows).
When warranty seals are broken.
warrantyExemptions.p1: ALL SAFESOLF PRODUCTS AND SERVICES ARE SOLD "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE", WITHOUT WARRANTY OF ANY KIND, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED.
warrantyExemptions.p2: SAFESOLF EXPRESSLY DISCLAIMS ANY WARRANTY, INCLUDING WITHOUT LIMITATION: Warranty that the products provide "total privacy", "absolute anonymity" or inviolable protection against interception, hacking, government surveillance, or any other risk; Warranty that the products are suitable for a particular purpose or meet your security expectations; Warranty that the products are free of defects, viruses, vulnerabilities, or will operate without interruption. No description, advertising, marketing, or oral or written statement by SAFESOLF or its representatives creates any warranty. You assume all risk related to the quality, performance, and safety of the products.

ownership.title: OWNERSHIP OF RIGHTS
ownership.p1: SAFESOLF is the owner or, as the case may be, has the corresponding licenses on the intellectual property exploitation rights of the Website, as well as of all the products and contents offered on it, including texts, photographs or illustrations, logos, trademarks, graphics, designs, interfaces, or any other information or content and services available through it.
ownership.p2: Likewise, in no case will it be understood that access, navigation, and/or use of the Web by the User, nor the use of products and/or services offered by SAFESOLF through its Web imply a total or partial waiver, transmission, license, or assignment of said rights by SAFESOLF.
ownership.p3: The User has a non-exclusive right of use of the contents and/or services of the Web, within a strictly domestic scope, and solely for the purpose of personally enjoying the features of the products and services that it offers, in accordance with these Conditions of Use.
ownership.p4: References to trademarks or registered trade names or other distinctive signs, whether owned by SAFESOLF or third-party companies, carry an implicit prohibition on their use without the consent of SAFESOLF and/or their legitimate owners. At no time does access, navigation, or use of the Website and/or its contents confer on the User any right over distinctive signs included therein.
ownership.p5: In the event that the User sends information of any kind to SAFESOLF through any of the channels enabled for this purpose, the User declares, warrants, and accepts that they have the right to do so freely, that said information does not infringe any intellectual property, industrial, trade secret, or any other rights of third parties, and that said information is not confidential or harmful to third parties.
ownership.p6: The User acknowledges assuming responsibility, holding SAFESOLF harmless for any communication, whether verbal or written, provided personally or in their name, reaching said responsibility, without any restriction, to any damages related to its accuracy, legality, originality, and/or ownership.
ownership.p7: Similarly, in the event that any User or third party considers that any of the contents of the Website owned by SAFESOLF violates their intellectual and/or industrial property rights, as well as any other rights, they must send a communication to marketing@encriptados.io with the necessary documentation proving such circumstance, and SAFESOLF will provide a full response as soon as possible.
ownership.p8: The User agrees to make an appropriate use of the contents, materials, products, and services that SAFESOLF offers on the Web and not to use them to engage in activities that are illegal or contrary to good faith and the legal system. The performance of any actions such as those described in the preceding paragraph by the User may lead to the adoption by SAFESOLF of the appropriate measures protected in the exercise of its rights or obligations, among which is the elimination or blocking of the offending User and, indeed, the potential report of the criminal events it notices.
ownership.p9: The User expressly acknowledges that in the event they carry out the aforementioned actions, they will not have the right to claim any compensation for the damages caused and, on the contrary, will be solely responsible for the damages that could be caused to SAFESOLF and/or any third parties. To this effect, the User expressly acknowledges and agrees to hold SAFESOLF harmless regarding any damages derived from actions like those described in the preceding paragraph.
ownership.p10: This guarantee of indemnity covers not only the amount of compensation and the costs of eventual judicial or arbitration proceedings, but also the expenses of professionals (lawyers, experts, etc.) that SAFESOLF has to incur to defend its rights and/or interests, both judicially and extrajudicially. The User who violates these prohibitions will be responsible for any claim produced as a consequence. The guarantee of indemnity described in this clause also applies to this case, which the User expressly acknowledges and accepts, and, therefore, the User must hold SAFESOLF harmless in the terms already referred.
ownership.p11: The User expressly acknowledges and accepts their responsibility for the eventual consequences derived from the violation of the regulations governing tangible and intangible assets, and undertakes to hold SAFESOLF harmless from any claim for this reason in the terms previously expressed.
ownership.p12: SAFESOLF reserves the right to modify the Conditions of Use at any time. In the event of modification of the Conditions of Use, the new version will be made available to Website Users with sufficient advance notice, and an informative communication will be sent to all registered Users, with the possibility of requesting their express acceptance if necessary.

jurisdiction.title: Jurisdiction
jurisdiction.p1: The Services are available for use in any country, as long as it does not contravene the legislation of the United States of America or that of the country of reported use and purchase. In this sense, you expressly agree to comply with all laws of the United States of America, and as applicable, foreign laws related to your use of the services. Therefore, you will not provide, transport, export, re-export, or otherwise make available, whether directly or indirectly and regardless of the form, including through visual access, the services or any technology or technical data used to provide such services or derived from them in a way that contradicts or may contradict the representations and warranties you made.
jurisdiction.p2: The fact that you can access the services from another location will not constitute a representation or agreement that the services are available in that location. Anyone who chooses to access the services in a jurisdiction other than where the Services are offered does so on their own initiative and at their own risk, and also understands that such access may be contrary to the laws applicable in it.
jurisdiction.p3: SAFESOLF reserves the right to interrupt, suspend, or terminate the provision of any product or Service if: (i) the end User does not comply with any of these Terms of Use, the Privacy Policy, or applicable laws; (ii) uses the products offered on the website for illegal purposes or any other purpose other than permitted purposes; (iii) for any other reason where such interruption, suspension, or termination is necessary in SAFESOLF's opinion.

otherProvisions.title: OTHER PROVISIONS
otherProvisions.p1: In some cases, SAFESOLF may collect personal information and other information: (i) in the course of providing its Services; and (ii) when you browse the website using cookies. In all cases, SAFESOLF uses security measures to protect the security and privacy of such personal information. SAFESOLF also implements various measures regarding the storage of personal information, as detailed in its Privacy Policy. By using the website and/or services, you agree to the provisions of that privacy policy, which are incorporated into these terms of use by reference.

liabilityDetail.title: LIABILITY
liabilityDetail.intro: THE END USER AND/OR CONSUMER ACKNOWLEDGES AND AGREES THAT:
liabilityDetail.p1: (A) ASSUMES ALL RISKS RELATED TO, OR DERIVADOS DE, THE USE, CONSULTATION OR ACCESS ON THEIR PART TO THE WEBSITE. THE WEBSITE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE", WITHOUT ANY WARRANTY;
liabilityDetail.p2: (B) WITHIN LEGAL LIMITS, SAFESOLF EXPRESSLY DISCLAIMS AND HEREBY ACCEPTS ALL WARRANTY OR LIABILITY, EXPRESS OR IMPLIED, STATUTORY OR OTHERWISE, INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO: IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF SATISFACTORY QUALITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, PROHIBITION OF IMPROPER USE, AND THOSE CUSTOMARY IN COMMERCIAL PRACTICE OR IN NEGOTIATIONS IN THIS SECTOR; AND
liabilityDetail.p3: (C) SAFESOLF EXPRESSLY DISCLAIMS ANY WARRANTY REGARDING: (I) THAT THE WEBSITE AND ITS CONTENT WILL ALWAYS BE FREE OF ERRORS OR VIRUSES OR WILL NEVER SUFFER ATTACKS BY THIRD PARTIES; (II) THE UNINTERRUPTED AND ALWAYS SECURE OPERATION OF THE WEBSITE; (III) THE PERMANENT AVAILABILITY OF THE SITE; (IV) THAT THE WEBSITE MEETS OR DOES NOT MEET THE USER'S NEEDS; AND (V) THE RELIABILITY, ACCURACY, COMPLETENESS, VALIDITY, OR TRUTHFULNESS OF THE INFORMATION PROVIDED BY THE USER.
liabilityDetail.p4: SAFESOLF will not be liable for any loss, whether indirect or not objectively foreseeable, such as loss of profits, business, or other opportunities arising from any defect, error, or breach regarding the website or services or otherwise.
liabilityDetail.p5: THE USER AGREES TO ASSUME ALL RISKS ASSOCIATED WITH, OR DERIVED FROM, THE USE OF THE WEBSITE OR THE INFORMATION PROVIDED BY THE USER, INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO, THE RISKS OF ECONOMIC LOSS, PROPERTY DAMAGE, AND EXPENSES OF NEGOTIATION WITH OTHER USERS OF THE WEBSITE (WHETHER UNKNOWN, MINORS, FOREIGNERS, OR PERSONS ACTING UNDER FALSE IDENTITY). THE USER ALSO UNDERTAKES TO HOLD HARMLESS SAFESOLF, ITS PARENT COMPANY, AND ITS SUBSIDIARIES AND AFFILIATES, AS WELL AS THE DIRECTORS, OFFICERS, SALES REPRESENTATIVES, AND EMPLOYEES OF ALL OF THEM, AGAINST CLAIMS, DEMANDS, OR CLAIMS FOR COMPENSATION FOR DAMAGES (DIRECT, INDIRECT, AND CONSEQUENTIAL) OF ANY KIND, KNOWN OR UNKNOWN, THAT MAY BE FILED BASED ON, OR DERIVED FROM, THE USE OF THE WEBSITE, THE INFORMATION PROVIDED BY THE USER, OR THE TRANSACTIONS OCCURRING AS A RESULT OF THE USER'S USE OF THE WEBSITE.
liabilityDetail.p6: ALWAYS WITHIN LEGAL LIMITS, THE USER ASSUMES AND AGREES THAT IN NO EVENT SHALL SAFESOLF OR ITS SUBSIDIARIES AND AFFILIATES, NOR ITS DIRECTORS, SALES REPRESENTATIVES, EMPLOYEES, OR SUPPLIERS OF ALL OF THEM, ASSUME ANY LIABILITY FOR DIRECT, INDIRECT, OR CONSEQUENTIAL LOSSES OR DAMAGES (INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO, PROPERTY DAMAGE AND PURELY ECONOMIC DAMAGE), NOR FOR LOSS OF PROFITS, REVENUE, DATA, OR INTERRUPTION OF USE, REGARDLESS OF THE CAUSE THAT PROVOKED THEM – CONTRACTUAL BREACH, TORT (INCLUDING NEGLIGENCE), OR BREACH OF WARRANTY – EVEN IF SAFESOLF HAD BEEN ADVISED OF THE POSSIBILITY OF OCCURRENCE OF SUCH LOSSES OR DAMAGES. IN THE EVENT THAT IN ANY JURISDICTION THE EXCLUSION OF CERTAIN WARRANTIES, LIMITATION OF LIABILITY, OR DISCLAIMER REGARDING CERTAIN DAMAGES IS PROHIBITED, SAFESOLF'S ACCUMULATED LIABILITY FOR DAMAGES SHALL NOT EXCEED USD$10.00 (TEN UNITED STATES DOLLARS), IF SO PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW.
liabilityDetail.p7: End users understand and agree that the use of the services is left to their total discretion, therefore they assume the risks inherent to users. SAFESOLF disclaims any liability regarding the use of these services and is not responsible for any damage caused by the use thereof.

contact.title: CONTACT
contact.p1: All questions, comments, or requests regarding these Terms of Use or the Privacy Policy should be directed to SAFESOLF INTERNACIONAL S.A.S. Inc. SAFESOLF will respond to questions and requests as soon as possible through its email communication channel cited in the initial contact.
contact.p2: SAFESOLF reserves the right to change or modify these Terms of Use, therefore updates to these terms will be available and easily accessible on the website. SAFESOLF recommends that these Terms of Use be reviewed periodically to review the current practices of SAFESOLF INTERNACIONAL S.A.S. Inc., as continued use of the Services will constitute acceptance of any amendment thereto.

forceMajeure.title: FORCE MAJEURE
forceMajeure.p1: SAFESOLF shall not be liable for any delay or failure caused by events beyond its reasonable control, including, without limitation, acts of God, war, riots, embargoes, epidemics, pandemics, acts of governmental authorities, internet failures or interruptions, cyber attacks, shortages of materials or labor, or any other similar cause.

disputes.title: DISPUTES AND ARBITRATION
disputes.p1: These Terms of Use, the Privacy Policy, any agreement entered into with You, and any dispute, claim, controversy, or difference arising out of or related to the same, to your account, to SAFESOLF products or services, or to your use of the website www.encriptados.io (including the formation, validity, interpretation, execution, or termination of this agreement), shall be governed and construed exclusively in accordance with the laws of the State of Delaware and the federal laws of the United States of America, without giving effect to its conflict of law principles.
disputes.p2: Any dispute, claim, or controversy that cannot be resolved amicably between the parties within thirty (30) days shall be resolved definitively and bindingly by arbitration, in accordance with the Commercial Arbitration Rules of the American Arbitration Association (AAA) in force at that time.
disputes.p3: The arbitration shall be administered by the American Arbitration Association (AAA) and shall be held in the city of Wilmington, State of Delaware, United States of America, before a single neutral arbitrator. The language of the arbitration shall be English. Each party shall pay its own costs, attorneys' fees, and expenses, unless the arbitrator directs otherwise in accordance with applicable law. The arbitrator's decision shall be final, binding, and may be entered as judgment in any court of competent jurisdiction.
disputes.p4: You expressly agree that any dispute shall be resolved on an individual basis and not as part of a class, consolidated, representative, or class action. You irrevocably waive any right to participate in any class, consolidated, or representative proceeding against SAFESOLF or its affiliates.
disputes.p5: Notwithstanding the foregoing, SAFESOLF or You may apply to a court of competent jurisdiction in the State of Delaware for injunctive relief, interdicts, or any other equitable remedy to protect their intellectual property rights, confidential information, or to prevent irreparable harm, without the need to previously submit such request to arbitration.
disputes.p6: If any part of this arbitration clause is held invalid or unenforceable, the remainder of the clause shall remain in full force and effect, and the parties shall submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the state or federal courts located in Wilmington, Delaware.

miscellaneous.title: MISCELLANEOUS
miscellaneous.p1: These Terms of Use, together with the Privacy Policy and any other agreement entered into with You, constitute the entire agreement between You and SAFESOLF and supersede all prior agreements, understandings, negotiations, and discussions between the parties, and there are no representations, warranties, covenants, conditions, or other terms other than those expressly contained in these Terms of Use, the Privacy Policy, and any such agreement. These Terms of Use may only be modified by SAFESOLF and only in writing.
miscellaneous.p2: Each party agrees to maintain the confidentiality of all information related to the existence of the dispute, except to the extent required by applicable law.

intro.p1: www.encriptados.io, a website whose domain is owned by the company SAFESOLF INTERNACIONAL S.A.S., in its capacity as a commercial company responsible for the processing of personal data obtained in the development of its corporate purpose and in compliance with the duties contained in Law 1581 of 2012, Decrees 886 of 2014, 1377 of 2013, and 886 of 2014, has created this personal data processing policy, in order to guarantee the legal protection of the fundamental rights of personal data owners, through its appropriate treatment through the collection, use, and protection of the information hosted on the aforementioned website, mobile applications, landings associated with the main page, chat pages, among others.
intro.p2: Navigation and/or use will constitute your acceptance of this Privacy Notice and Use of Cookies, as well as consent for the development of the practices described.

responsible.title: RESPONSIBLE AND IN CHARGE OF PERSONAL DATA PROCESSING
responsible.p1: The company SAFESOLF INTERNACIONAL S.A.S., with email address contacto@encriptados.io, collects the information you provide when making a purchase on our website, creating an account, entering your data in the Chat, registering to receive emails and newsletters, and also receives data information from third parties. Therefore, the responsible company collects the information you enter on your computer, tablet, or device used to navigate the Sites; cookies information or similar tracking tools in order to provide you with products and services suitable for your needs.

policy.title: DATA PROCESSING POLICY
policy.p1: Taking into account that the company SAFESOLF INTERNACIONAL S.A.S. has as its corporate purpose business administration activities and management consulting activities and given the need to ensure proper data management in compliance with Law 1581 of 2012 and Decrees 886 of 2014, 1377 of 2013, and 886 of 2014, and subsequent, it allows to establish a personal data processing policy, which guarantees the protection of the fundamental rights of personal data owners in their treatment.
policy.p2: A company whose activity is investment in Colombian or foreign companies, and national and international investment.

nature.title: NATURE OF RECORDS AND DATA COLLECTED BY SAFESOLF INTERNACIONAL S.A.S.
nature.p1: The company, in the development of its corporate purpose, collects information through all its customer service channels (Written, Telephone, chat, among others), during the 8 business hours of the day, from Monday to Friday, guaranteeing service in accordance with demand.
nature.p2: SAFESOLF INTERNACIONAL S.A.S. shares information with the Parent Company and with service providers to manage the Sites, to make payments by users, to provide products, and services. Therefore, the company does not sell or share Personal Information for use outside of its brands.

purpose.title: PURPOSE OF INFORMATION PROCESSING
purpose.intro: The collection and processing of personal data by SAFESOLF INTERNACIONAL S.A.S. has the following purposes:
list: Capture and update user and/or purchaser data on our websites.
Manage information that allows generating interactions of interest and communication spaces with users of our products and services.
Respond to National Government regulations in relation to the source and exchange of information.
Promote registration, appropriate use, administration, and truthfulness of the collected information.

Perform commercial activities such as sending notices of changes in policies, products, offers, processing applications and transactions; publishing consumer content and reviews on the Sites, in our social networks, among others.

sensitive.title: PROCESSING OF SENSITIVE DATA
sensitive.p1: SAFESOLF INTERNACIONAL S.A.S. will guarantee that the processing of this information will be carried out without the need to request access to the sensitive data of users, in order to establish mechanisms that adequately protect the rights over personal data, in compliance with the provisions contained in Law 1581 of 2012 and its special Decrees.

recipients.title: PEOPLE TO WHOM THE INFORMATION MAY BE PROVIDED
recipients.intro: The information that meets the conditions established in the Law may be supplied to the following persons:
list: To the owners, their successors (when those are absent), or their legal representatives.
To public or administrative entities in the exercise of their legal functions or by court order.
To third parties expressly authorized by the owner or by law.

authorization.title: OWNER AUTHORIZATION
authorization.p1: The owner of the personal data must give their prior, express, and informed authorization for its processing, which must be obtained by any means (physical or electronic) that can be subject to subsequent consultation.
authorization.p2: The company responsible for data processing collects information automatically by the means described previously, specifically when purchases are made through the Site, when you send your data in forms, email, chats, photos, videos, reviews; said information is estimated in identification data (name, email, country, phone number, payment information, among others).
authorization.p3: In addition to the information collected automatically, that arising from activities with our service providers is also estimated, who collect information automatically to execute payments for our products and services, which is why information such as your browser type, the type of device from which you connect, the pages you visited, and your navigation preferences is likely collected.
authorization.p4: In permitted navigations, we use 'Cookies', which are used to allow user interaction with social networks. In case of non-acceptance of cookies, you can modify your browser settings and choose to accept them or not.
authorization.p5: We may receive information from third-party data providers, such as marketing, in which case the company will process the data as a processor, according to the instructions of the controller.
authorization.p6: We may share your personal information with other companies of the parent, in case of acquisition and/or sale of assets. If another company acquires our assets or assets related to the sites, the personal information we have may be disclosed to said company as one of the transferred assets.
authorization.p7: The authorization of the personal data owner will not be necessary for processing in the following cases:
list: Information required by a public or administrative entity in the exercise of its legal functions or by court order;
Data of public nature;
Cases of medical or sanitary emergency;
Processing of information authorized by law for historical, statistical, or scientific purposes;
Data related to the Civil Registry of Persons.

rights.title: RIGHTS THAT ASSIST YOU AS OWNER
rights.intro: The owners of the information have the following rights:
list: Know, update, rectify and request proof of their personal data from SAFESOLF INTERNACIONAL S.A.S.
Be informed by SAFESOLF INTERNACIONAL S.A.S., upon request, regarding the use given to their personal data.
Present before the Superintendence of Industry and Commerce complaints for violations of the provisions of Law 1581 of 2012 and other rules that modify, add or complement it.
Revoke the authorization and/or request the deletion of personal data when the constitutional and legal principles, rights, and guarantees are not respected in the processing.
Access free of charge their personal data that have been processed.

attention.title: RESPONSIBLE FOR THE ATTENTION OF ENQUIRIES AND CLAIMS
attention.p1: The person responsible for receiving inquiries and complaints related to the Owner's personal data is our privacy officer, before whom the Owner of the information can exercise their rights to know, update, rectify, delete and revoke authorization. The above can be done through customer service channels.
attention.p2: To make petitions, inquiries, or complaints in order to exercise the rights to know, update, rectify, delete data or revoke the granted authorization, email: contacto@encriptados.io

procedure.title: PROCEDURE FOR THE ATTENTION OF ENQUIRIES AND CLAIMS
procedure.intro: The rights of the owners may be exercised before SAFESOLF INTERNACIONAL S.A.S. by the following persons:
list: By the Owner, who must sufficiently accredit their identity.
By their successors, who must accredit such quality.
By the representative and/or attorney of the Owner, after accreditation of the representation or power of attorney duly granted.

security.title: INFORMATION SECURITY AND MEASURES
security.p1: In development of the security principle established in current regulations, the company will adopt the technical, human, and administrative measures to provide security to the records, avoiding their alteration, loss, consultation, use, or unauthorized or fraudulent access.
security.p2: We will keep your information for as long as necessary to offer you our products and services. If you wish to cancel the subscription, please contact us at the email.

copyright.title: COPYRIGHT
copyright.p1: In accordance with the laws governing literary and artistic property rights or other similar rights, the reproduction or redistribution of the elements that make up the www.encriptados.io website, in whole or in part, is strictly prohibited.

validity.title: ENTRY INTO FORCE
validity.p1: This Personal Data Processing Policy was created on January 27, 2020, and starts to apply from the moment of its publication; therefore, it can be modified without prior notice in accordance with changes in Colombian legislation.

intro.p1: SAFESOLF INTERNACIONAL S.A.S. Inc. (“SAFESOLF”, “we”, “us” or “the Company”), with registered address at 2055 Limestone Rd STE 200-C, Wilmington, DE 19808, United States, uses cookies and similar tracking technologies on our website www.encriptados.io and all related services (hereinafter, the “Site”).
intro.p2: This Cookies Policy explains what cookies are, what types we use, what we use them for, and how you can manage or reject them.
intro.p3: By continuing to browse the Site, you accept the use of cookies as described in this policy. If you do not agree, you can configure or reject cookies through your browser or the cookie banner that appears when you enter.

whatAre.title: 1. WHAT ARE COOKIES?
whatAre.p1: Cookies are small text files that a website places on your device (computer, tablet, mobile) when you visit it. They allow the site to remember your actions and preferences over time, so you do not have to reconfigure them each time you return.
whatAre.p2: We also use similar technologies such as pixels, web beacons, and local storage.

types.title: 2. TYPES OF COOKIES WE USE

rows.purpose: Allow basic site operation (navigation, cart, login, security)
Analyze how users use the site (pages visited, time, errors)
Show relevant ads and measure campaign effectiveness
Cookies placed by Google Analytics, Meta, payment processors, etc.

types.footer: We do not use cookies to track your activity invasively or to create detailed behavioral profiles.

thirdParty.title: 3. THIRD-PARTY COOKIES
thirdParty.p1: Some of our service providers may place cookies on your device when you visit the Site:
list: Google Analytics (traffic analysis)
Payment platforms (Stripe, crypto processors)
Social networks (for sharing content)
Email marketing tools
thirdParty.p2: These cookies are controlled by third parties and are subject to their own privacy policies.

manage.title: 4. HOW TO MANAGE OR REJECT COOKIES
manage.p1: You can control cookies in the following ways:
list: Cookie banner → Upon entering the Site, you can accept or reject non-essential cookie categories.

Browser configuration:
• Google Chrome → Settings → Privacy and security → Cookies and other site data
• Mozilla Firefox → Options → Privacy and Security
• Safari → Preferences → Privacy
• Microsoft Edge → Settings → Cookies and site permissions

Opt-out tools:
• Google Analytics Opt-out: Google Analytics Opt-out
• Your Online Choices (Europe): www.youronlinechoices.com
manage.note: Important note: If you reject essential cookies, some parts of the Site may not function correctly (for example, you will not be able to complete a purchase).

updates.title: 5. UPDATES TO THIS POLICY
updates.p1: We may modify this Cookies Policy at any time. The updated version will be published here with the "Last updated" date. We recommend that you review it periodically. Continued use of the Site after any changes implies acceptance of the new version.

contact.title: 6. CONTACT
contact.p1: For any questions about this Cookies Policy, contact us at:
contact.address:
SAFESOLF INTERNACIONAL S.A.S. Inc.
2055 Limestone Rd STE 200-C Wilmington, DE 19808 United States
